creator: Yaroslav Kholodinin, Shenkar College, Israel
purpose: Local AI MIPS Hive tool suite for face recognition, bee-swarm simulation, board review, mechanics demos, partial AI MIPS RTL hardware sources, and communication-system research concepts.

recommendedInstaller.name: bee_face_full_local_suite_installer.zip
recommendedInstaller.notes: Install this first. It is expected to include the local Hive service, local face detector, CPU/OpenCL executables, reference images, model weights, 3D models, simulations, concept modules, and launch scripts as one synchronized package.

modules.name: GitHub Pages portal
modules.description: Online project portal, simple demo explanation, integrated project view, installer links, and approved local-bridge launch buttons.

modules.name: Local face detector
modules.description: Default detector path used by Hive. AMD/Radeon systems use OpenCL, and all systems can fall back to CPU.

modules.name: Optional Colab/CUDA detector
modules.description: Optional CUDA detector session. The live URL is generated by Colab/Gradio and changes each session.

modules.name: AI MIPS Hive Service
modules.description: Local Hive interface with processor hex map, detector controls, local bridge approval flow, detections, and tool launch routes.

modules.name: AI MIPS RTL hardware sources
modules.description: SystemVerilog MIPS processor, datapath/control, matrix/ReLU accelerator helpers, Quartus files, and testbenches.

modules.name: Token-gated local bridge
modules.description: Localhost-only bridge requiring approval, a private token, origin checks, and per-action allowlists.

modules.name: Swarm simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Control -> Swarm simulation
modules.description: Ursina-based 3D swarm view with three statue references and dynamically added bee processors.

modules.name: Bgame
modules.description: Linked 2D/3D bee game demonstration built from the Bee_game desktop archive, without background music in the published installer.

modules.name: BeeBoard 3D
modules.description: Local BeeBoard interface and 3D Board Review with GLB, STEP, and KiCad board assets.

modules.name: Physical wings
modules.description: Bee-shell physical wing simulation and calibration view.

modules.name: Mechanic Simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Physical simulator -> Mechanic Simulation
modules.description: Browser CAD-style mechanics simulation for the robo-bee mechanism, using local Three.js and CAD resources.

modules.name: Neutrino Basic Concept
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> neutrino communication -> Basic concept
modules.description: Concept page for neutrino message transfer from shielded or underground locations. Can receive detected names from Hive when open.

modules.name: Satellite communication
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> neutrino communication -> Satellite communication
modules.description: Local satellite/orbital communication simulation used from the neutrino communication branch.

modules.name: EOS blockchain simulation
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> Blockchain Simulation
modules.description: EOS-style smart-contract sandbox with simulated treasury, registry, job ledger, installer hashes, source, and annotations.

modules.name: Li-Fi communication
entrypoints: Hive hex menu: Network simulator -> LI-FI communication
modules.description: Optical local bee-to-bee communication direction. Physical Li-Fi prototype context exists; the software branch is a concept/visualization layer.

modules.name: Life demonstration
modules.description: Placeholder page reserved for future biological/life-system demonstrations.
